notes: v0.28.5 — LOCKER overhaul. Tiles now draw distinct silhouettes per shape/kind (no more identical colored circles for 16 different items). Clicking any tile sets a live preview on the left composite. New PREVIEW ACTION CARD shows the previewed item's name + an EQUIP/BUY/ACTIVE button — click STAR (200 SURGE) and now actually see how it looks + a clear BUY button + a 'NOT ENOUGH SURGE — need X more' toast on fail. Composite preview ports the 16 shape recipes (SUN SPARK / PRISM DART / VOID ECHO / SHIELD ORB / HAMMER / HEX CELL / CROSS BOLT / NEEDLE DART / SCALPEL / NEON LASER / SINGULARITY / NOTE / BEAT BAR / SEED / STAR / ASH PULSE) + 16 trail kinds so the live ship preview shows the actual variety, not color-only.
